title: dactylorchis × masteineri
intro: Dactylorchis × masteineri, also known as Masteiner's orchid, is a hybrid plant species in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis × masteineri include its potential to soothe respiratory tract irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
